articles.headline: American ref Elfath to oversee England-Argentina semifinal
articles.description: American referee Ismail Elfath has been appointed to take charge of Wednesday's FIFA World Cup semifinal between England and Argentina at Mercedes-Benz Stadium.

images.name: Moreno: Kane is the best player Argentina have faced this World Cup
images.caption: Moreno: Kane is the best player Argentina have faced this World Cup

articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Haaland returns to Norway with stuffed raccoon in tow
articles.description: Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition as we now know our four World Cup semifinalists.

images.name: Erling Haaland 260713 [1296x729]
images.caption: Erling Haaland
images.credit: Jan Langhaug / NTB / AFP via Getty Images

images.credit: Alex Pantling - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Spain's Yamal: If anyone can stop France, it's us
images.caption: Spain's Yamal: If anyone can stop France, it's us

articles.headline: De La Fuente: Spain know France 'much better' than Euro '24
articles.description: Spain head coach Luis de la Fuente said he knows France are a much better team than the one they defeated in the Euro 2024 semifinals two years ago.

images.name: Hislop: Yamal needs to be at his best in order for Spain to beat France
images.caption: Hislop: Yamal needs to be at his best in order for Spain to beat France

articles.headline: France's Deschamps predicts 'spectacular' semifinal vs. Spain
articles.description: France head coach Didier Deschamps deflected questions about his team's World Cup favorite status and projected a "spectacular game" against Spain in Tuesday's semifinal.

images.name: Has Olise 'outshined' Mbappé for France at the World Cup?
images.caption: Has Olise 'outshined' Mbappé for France at the World Cup?

articles.headline: England vs. Argentina: Declan Rice winning fitness race for World Cup semifinal - sources
articles.description: England are increasingly optimistic Declan Rice will be fit to start Wednesday's World Cup semifinal against Argentina, sources have told ESPN.

Declan Rice #4 of England in the pool during a recovery day during the England World Cup 2026 Camp

articles.headline: Koundé says Yamal meant no 'lack of respect' in France gibe
articles.description: Jules Koundé said Monday that Spain winger Lamine Yamal's comments that France should fear the defending Euro champions ahead of their FIFA World Cup semifinal weren't a sign of disrespect.

images.name: Kounde Yamal Barcelona [1296x729]
images.caption: Barcelona teammates Lamine Yamal and Jules Kounde are set to face off at the World Cup semi between Spain and France.
